---
title: "CV"
---

[Download CV (PDF)](cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

---

## Education

**PhD in [Field]** (Expected [Year])
[University], [Country]

**MSc in [Field]** ([Year])
[University], [Country]

---

## Positions

**[Position]** ([Year–Present])
[Institution]

---

## Awards & Grants

- Award name, Year

---

## Teaching

- Course name, [Institution], [Year]
